title: HardcorePvBih PVP
description: A PvP Texture Pack designed for Netherite OP and other sword modes, including Mace.
body: The perfect pack for pvpers! It has short swords, customized netherite armor and many more! This Texture Pack is mostly for the 1.21.11 because of the copper sword. It also has customized black buttons (for example Singleplayer/Multiplayer button) and a custom crosshair!
